biography: Don’t just see a place. Experience it.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
ATTENTION! We are looking for one person to move to Italy and transform their life, on us.

What you get:
• A round-trip flight to Sambuca, Italy
• Renovated, rent-free home while learning how to be an Airbnb Host
• Italian lessons and cultural immersion sessions

Requirements:
• Must be over 18
• Available to move to Sambuca from June 30th, 2022 to September 30th, 2022
• Conversational in English
• Commitment to contributing to village life

Apply via the link in our bio.
Join @airbnbexperiences around the virtual fire for a special holiday-inspired musical event. 🔥 For more ways to get together even when we can’t be together, check out the link in our bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Online Experiences Present: Yule Log Radio

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Watch Online Experience hosts @chrissoria & @marcmaniac from @maniacpumpkins carve a chupacabra from Puerto Rico.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Live Pumpkin Carving: With Your Hosts, Chris & Marc

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Some of your favorite @TikTok creators are coming to @AirbnbExperiences. Go behind the scenes and learn their secrets of self-expression—right from home. Work out with @trevorbell, take better photos with @bonnierzm, make home videos with @itsthemcfarlands, dance with choreographer @arbengiga and more. Link in bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Airbnb x TikTok

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Join @pita_tofua and many other Olympians and Paralympians from around the world as they bring you into their homes for a unique set of experiences on Airbnb.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Olympian and Paralympian Online Experiences

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
For COVID-19 responders like Chiara, a home is more than just a place to stay.

#InternationalNursesDay
latestIgtvVideos.title: Frontline Stays

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Happy Mother’s Day from Miami baker and @airbnbexperiences host, @laromibakery. Originally from Argentina, she’ll show you how to make traditional alfajores that are sure to sweeten up Mom’s day. For as beautiful as these dulce de leche sandwich cookies turn out, they’re surprisingly simple to make. Follow Romina’s foolproof recipe or join her Online Experience to make a sweet suite of Latin desserts. Link in bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Take 5: Alfajores—Mother’s Day Edition

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Happy Mother’s Day from Nashville-based singer-songwriter and @airbnbexperiences host, @annebucklemusic. She comes from a long line of Carter family songstresses, and she’s here to help you put a melody to your message for mom. Follow Anne’s simple tricks for crafting a tune, or join her Online Experience for live instruction and melody-making. Link in bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Take 5: Songwriting—Mother’s Day Edition

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Happy Mother’s Day from Barcelona-based artist and @airbnbexperiences host, @iallamozas. She’ll teach you to make a beautiful card out of magazines, newspapers, books, photos, pressed leaves and flowers—whatever materials you can find around your home. Follow along or join her live Online Experience to cut and compose like a pro. Link in bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Take 5: Collage Cards—Mother’s Day Edition

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
In March, @AirbnbExperiences hosts all over the world had to stop doing what they love—sharing their interests and passions with others. 
Over the past few weeks, they’ve offered ideas for how to continue hosting even while we’re apart. 
They’ve adapted recipes based on what’s in their pantries, turned living rooms into yoga studios, and choreographed dances for families at home.

Today we’re excited to announce that Airbnb Experiences are now online. You can take a flamenco class with Lidón in Madrid, participate in a tarot card reading with Mak in Austin, or visit a colony of penguins in Cape Town—all from home.

True to Airbnb Experiences in real life, Online Experiences are hosted by remarkable people and set in small groups. Alongside making a new dish, maybe you’ll make a new friend, too.

Thank you to our incredible hosts around the world. We’ll see you online soon —> link in bio.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Airbnb Experiences are now online

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Be one of 5 volunteers to join Airbnb for a once in a lifetime opportunity to help preserve the traditions and become part of the Bahamian community.
latestIgtvVideos.title: The Bahamas Sabbatical: Life Underwater

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Inspired by your travels on Airbnb, designed by 3.1 Phillip Lim. Follow the flamingo to the sleepwear of your dreams.
latestIgtvVideos.title: See You In My Dream

latestPosts.caption: We went to the cottage on @airbnb let us show you around 😏 #airbnbpartner

📍 Saint-Adjutory, France
Five hours south of Paris where days are slow, the garden grows wild herbs, and this tiny home is all you need.

Every trip has a stop you didn’t plan. Make it @sabrinacarpenter’s Pit Stop.

Book now at link in bio.

📍 Nago, Japan
Where you can sleep in Japan’s “miracle forest”

Start anywhere.

These are the spots locals keep coming back to in Silver Lake.

Save this.

Local Favorites — Silver Lake
Los Angeles, CA

Not just a bookstore.
A place where people meet, connect, and keep coming back.

A Los Feliz staple since 1996, @skylightbooks sits just below Griffith Park with a curated mix of fiction, art, film, and culture. Easy to pop into after dinner, harder to leave without a stack.

Don’t miss their free author events, happening most nights of the week.

Local Favorites — Los Feliz

📍Skylight Books
1818 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles

You can walk down Sunset and hit 10 different coffee shops.
Here’s the one that feels like home.

@handlescoffee is a Silver Lake go-to with a loyal following and a menu people know by heart.

Order:
• Handles Coffee (iced)
• Handles Matcha
• Silver Lake Latte (orange mocha twist)

Local Favorites — Silver Lake

📍Handles Coffee
4459 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

Started on a porch during Covid.
Now a Silver Lake staple.

@lasorteds is a love letter to LA built on sourdough, long cooks, and a style that’s entirely its own.

Order:
• Upside down slice (trust it)
• Mortadella focaccia
• Pie of the Month

Local Favorites — Silver Lake

📍LaSorted’s
2847 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

i raided hannah montana’s closet - now bookable on @airbnb 😭😭💖💖
#airbnbpartner

Came for one last sandwich. Ended up saving the place.

@cafetropicalsunset is a Silver Lake institution, opened in 1975 and brought back by the neighborhood that refused to let it go.

Order:
• Cubano
• Guava cheese
• Café con leche

Local Favorites — Silver Lake

📍Cafe Tropical
2900 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

In Silver Lake and Los Feliz, the best spots don’t try too hard. They just always deliver.

If you’re doing this neighborhood right, here’s what to hit.

1 ☕️ @handlescoffee
A neighborhood staple with a loyal following.
4459 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

2 🥐 @wildes.la
A cozy, British-inspired breakfast spot.
1850 Hillhurst Ave, Los Angeles

3 🍕 @lasorteds
A love letter to LA, served by the slice.
2847 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

4 🥪 @cafetropicalsunset
An iconic Cuban spot the neighborhood helped save.
2900 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles

5 🍸 @vandell.losangeles
A rare cocktail spot for the area.
1966 Hillhurst Ave, Los Angeles

Save this for your next trip to LA.
